mechanism_narrative: A positive 3-month trend in retail sales signals near-term household demand strength that lifts expected corporate revenues and produces positive S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:RSAFS latest snapshot value 384211 as of t-1mo
failure_condition: Reject if higher 3-month RSAFS growth does not produce higher 20-day SPX returns in walk-forward tests, with Rank IC below 0.03 over a 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: A rise in unemployment above its recent trend signals deteriorating labor income and recession-risk repricing, causing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE crosses above its trailing 6-month average by more than 0.3 percentage points
evidence_refs: fact:UNRATE latest snapshot value 5.5 as of t-1mo
failure_condition: Reject if triggered unemployment-deterioration episodes have positive 60-day SPX returns more than 55% of the time or mean triggered returns are not below unconditional returns.

mechanism_narrative: When the federal funds rate is above a low-rate threshold and consumer prices are rising, tighter nominal discount rates and inflation pressure reduce equity valuation multiples, producing negative 20-day S&P 500 returns.
candidate_trigger: FEDFUNDS crosses above 1.5% while CPIAUCSL is above its level 12 months earlier
evidence_refs: fact:FEDFUNDS latest snapshot value 2.0 as of t-1mo
failure_condition: Reject if the joint FEDFUNDS-CPIAUCSL trigger does not forecast lower 20-day SPX returns than either single proxy alone in out-of-sample walk-forward tests.

mechanism_narrative: A sustained increase in industrial production signals improving real output and operating leverage for cyclical firms, driving positive S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:INDPRO latest snapshot value 110.9051 as of t-2mo
failure_condition: Reject if positive 6-month INDPRO growth is followed by below-median 20-day SPX returns in more than 55% of walk-forward observations.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp decline in housing starts signals weakening durable-goods demand, construction employment, and household confidence, causing negative S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: HOUST crosses below its trailing 12-month average by more than 10%
evidence_refs: fact:HOUST latest snapshot value 975.0 as of t-2mo
failure_condition: Reject if HOUST downside triggers are not followed by lower 60-day SPX returns than non-triggered periods, or if the triggered hit rate for negative returns is below 50%.

mechanism_narrative: Low policy rates combined with stable consumer prices indicate accommodative real financial conditions, supporting equity valuation multiples and producing positive S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: FEDFUNDS remains below 2.5% and CPIAUCSL 6-month annualized growth is below its trailing 3-year median
evidence_refs: fact:CPIAUCSL latest snapshot value 215.132 as of t-2mo
failure_condition: Reject if the low-rate stable-price state fails to deliver higher average 60-day SPX returns than unconditional returns in at least two-thirds of rolling 3-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: Payroll growth accompanied by a falling unemployment rate signals broad labor-market improvement and positive earnings revisions, creating positive S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days.
candidate_trigger: PAYEMS 3-month change is positive and UNRATE crosses below its trailing 6-month average
evidence_refs: fact:PAYEMS latest snapshot value 137640.0 as of t-1mo
failure_condition: Reject if the joint payroll-unemployment trigger has no positive 5-day return edge after releases, or if its out-of-sample mean return is below the unconditional 5-day mean.

mechanism_narrative: Real GDP growth paired with expanding retail sales confirms broad demand momentum, increasing expected aggregate earnings and producing positive S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: GDPC1 is above its value four quarters earlier and RSAFS is above its value three months earlier
evidence_refs: fact:GDPC1 latest snapshot value 11703.6 as of t-6mo
failure_condition: Reject if the joint GDPC1-RSAFS expansion state does not produce positive 60-day SPX returns more than 55% of the time in walk-forward validation.
